brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 21 weeks with valid cascade logic and correct 3:1 overage ratio interpretation matching the ground truth; goes one level beyond surface by tracing the cascade propagation from Implementation through Testing and computing the Monitoring overlap effect; checks overlap logic explicitly ('Monitoring starts at same time Deployment starts') and notes the 22-week sequential baseline as a sanity reference; provides a timeline table that functions as a structural verification and cites the fully-sequential counterfactual; states the ratio interpretation as fact without flagging it as an assumption that could be read differently; only one interpretation of the Testing overage rule is considered — the alternate fixed-+1-week reading is never acknowledged or rejected; every phase has an explicit derivation with start/end weeks tabulated, fully reproducible by a third party; uses pessimistic estimate as specified and avoids best-case anchoring but does not explicitly name why optimistic anchoring would fail here; avoids all major suppressed failure modes (no optimism bias, no best-case anchoring) but does not explicitly call out any suppressed pattern by name; follows a linear extraction-then-cascade path rather than the branching topology (G1/G2 gates, FIXED_POINT loop, saturation exit) suggested by the injection graph.
